item.itunes:title: 119 - Bot Bops (w/ Carrie Aizley)
item.itunes:author: SiriusXM | SmartLess Media
item.itunes:summary:
On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes welcome Sean’s good friend Carrie Aizley back to the show, and this time it’s a showdown in the 80s with a new edition of Bot Bops - Elliott’s non-branded digital assistant will regale you with five famous 80s classics in its own cold, inhuman style, name the song for one point and the artist for another point! Keep track of your answers in order to solve the MegaClue!
New episodes every Monday and Thursday. Puzzles in this episode are by Josh Richmond and Matthew Broussard. Script by Elliott Kalan. Music and sound effects by Devon Torrey Bryant.

item.title: 118 - Word Centipede (w/ Carrie Aizley)
item.description:
On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes welcome one of Sean’s best friends, writer/actress Carrie Aizley, to go toe-to-hundreds-of-toes with our old nemesis, the Word Centipede - what word can you put before or after the three words we give you to make three new compound words, and can you do it faster than Sean and Carrie? This episode’s MegaClue will have you belting to the rafters!


 

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Kevin Leman and Matthew Broussard.


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.title: 117 - Bizarro TV Guide (w/ Ali Wentworth)
item.description:
On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes welcome Ali Wentworth back to play another brand new game, Bizarro TV Guide - a copy of the TV Guide has fallen into Elliott’s possession from an alternate universe where things are pretty opposite, can you make heads or tails of the titles in their Reality TV section, and translate them back into our world? Keep track of your answers, you’ll need them to solve the MegaClue!


 

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Josh Richmond and Matthew Broussard.


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.title: 116 - Word Workout (w/ Ali Wentworth)
item.description:
On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes welcome Ali Wentworth back to the show to play a brand new game, Word Workout - each of the words we give you wants to slim down by one letter, and the remaining letters can be rearranged to answer the given clue. It’s a fun, fast new game with a seasonal MegaClue to unscramble!


 

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Josh Richmond.


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.title: 115 - Tone Note (w/ Ali Wentworth)
item.description:
On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes welcome back Sean’s good friend, comedian Ali Wentworth, to play a new round of Tone Note, and this time it’s all about New Year’s party accessories - we give you a clue, and the answer will be a two-word phrase where both words are anagrams of each other, much like the game’s name, Tone Note! This time you won’t need to remember the answers for the MegaClue, but be prepared for a very long anagram!


 

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Kevin Leman and Devon Torrey Bryant.


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.title: 113 - It’s A Numbers Game (w/ Scotty Icenogle)
item.description:
On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes invite Sean’s husband Scotty Icenogle back for more seasonal games, and this time it’s a festive twist on It’s A Numbers Game - we give you a simple math problem in the form of gifts from The 12 Days Of Christmas with their numbers removed, can you solve the clues faster than Sean and Scotty? More importantly, can you perform the answers with more intensity?


 

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Kevin Leman and Devon Torrey Bryant.


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.title: 112 - Bot Bops (w/ Scotty Icenogle)
item.description:
On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes invite Sean’s husband Scotty Icenogle back to the show to play some holiday games, and today it’s a festive Bot Bops - Elliott’s non-branded digital assistant will regale you with five famous Christmas songs in its own cold, inhuman style, name the song for one point and the artist for another point! And even if you can do it faster than Sean and Scotty - actually, you’ll probably be okay with the MegaClue, we took it easy on you, the holidays are a stressful time.


 

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Josh Richmond and Kevin Leman.


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.title: 111 - Letter Perfect (w/ Reyna Larson)
item.description:
On this episode of ClueLess, it’s Poochie Vs Poochie, as host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes invite Sean’s high school bestie Reyna Larson to play a brand new, competitive game, Letter Perfect - we give you a letter, and five categories, the game is to submit an answer that fits the category and has as many instances of the given letter as possible to score the most points! Can you beat the Poochies? And even if so, will you be able to think of a word that fits the MegaClue?!


 

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Josh Richmond and Kevin Leman.


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.description:

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Josh Richmond.

On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes invite Sean’s husband Scotty Icenogle to play a round of It’s A Numbers Game, and this time it’s all about movies! We give you a simple math problem in the form of famous films with the numbers removed, can you solve the clues faster than Sean and Scotty? Even if so, never forget the small matter of this episode’s MegaClue!
New episodes every Monday and Thursday. Puzzles in this episode are by Matthew Broussard and Josh Richmond.

item.title: 107 - Tone Note (w/ Scotty Icenogle)
item.description:
On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes welcome back Sean’s husband Scotty to play a new game called Tone Note - we give you a clue, and the answer will be a two-word phrase where both words are anagrams of each other, much like the game’s name, Tone Note! Even if you can master the game, will you be able to spot the hidden connection that forms its MegaClue?!


 

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Matthew Broussard and Kevin Leman.


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.title: 106 - Word Centipede (w/ Scotty Icenogle)
item.description:
On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes invite Sean’s actual husband Scotty Icenogle to play a round of Word Centipede - what word can you put before or after the three words we give you to make three new compound words, and can you do it faster than Sean and Scotty? Even if you can, what celebrity is the Word Centipede thinking of in its MegaClue?!


 

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Kevin Leman and Josh Richmond.


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.title: 104 - Bot Bops (w/ Ali Wentworth)
item.description:
On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes welcome back Ali Wentworth to play a round of Bot Bops - Elliott’s non-branded digital assistant will regale you with five famous songs in its own cold, inhuman style, name the song for one point and the artist for another point! Even if you can do it faster than Sean and Ali, what about the hidden connection that forms the MegaClue?!


 

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Kevin Leman and Josh Richmond.


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.title: 102 - Odd One Out (w/ Ali Wentworth)
item.description:
On this episode of ClueLess, host Elliott Kalan and constant contestant Sean Hayes welcome Sean’s good friend, comedian Ali Wentworth, to play a round of Odd One Out - the Backstreet Boys are going on a picnic but they brought too many items, can you identify which ones don’t belong? And even if you can, how do they relate to the MegaClue?!


 

New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

Puzzles in this episode are by Josh Richmond and Kevin Leman.


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.title: SmartLess Presents ClueLess!
item.description:
Welcome to a brand new, bite-sized game show from SmartLess Media, this is ClueLess, where every episode contains a different main game and cliffhanger puzzle, and every episode also contains Sean Hayes! Host Elliott Kalan (Mystery Science Theater 3000, The Daily Show With Jon Stewart, The Flop House) will lead Sean and a rotating guest through each episode's conundrum, from anagrams to pop culture math puzzles to singing robots, and more! SmartLess Presents ClueLess premieres November 18th, new episodes every Monday and Thursday!


Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.
